TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == kal¬∑bu-li-te-li-si¬∑Pin-s "kamu nu Te, Karl Friedrich Benz, 1844 a mihca 11 a bulad 25 a demiad katukuh 1929 a hihca 4 a bulad 4 a demiad" Te-kow kikay a sayhu atu sinmung nu mikawaway, u saayaway misanga' tu Pin-s a kazizeng ciniza, 1885 a mihcaan miseyki atu misanga' tu cacayay a kangkang malikatay a kikay micuduhay tu tuluay bihel a kazizeng, u saayaway tahkal i kitakit, ayza masinga' tu i labu nu s-tu-cya-Pin-s a po-u-kwang. 1886 a mkihcaan misanga' tu saayaway sepatay a bihel a kazizeng, malingatu pacakay i Ow-co, 1899 a mihcaan misanga' tu saayaway a sapidademec a kazizeng, 1906 a mihcaan Pin-s atu tatusaay a wawa niza i la-ten-paw patizeng tu pin-s malawama a kusi, Pin-s a kazizeng mala singanganay a paya nu kitakid, 1926 a mihcaan papulung han ku Pin-s a kusi atu tay-mu kazizeng. 1844 a mihca 11 a bulad 25 a demiad, ci Pin-s lecuhan i Te-kow-pa-ten-Bu-ten-paw ayaw nu kalaacawaan nu ama ina a lecuhen niza, namahiza mikulul tu ngangan ni ina ci Ye-se-ben¬∑Wa-lan-te "Josephine Vaillant", ci Ka-al¬∑Bu-li-te-li-si¬∑Mi-sye-al¬∑Wa-lan-te "Karl Friedrich Michael Vaillant" ku ngangan, wama ci Ye-han¬∑Cyaw-ce¬∑pin-s "Johann Georg Benz" u paculilay tu kazizeng" 1844ŚĻī11śúą25śó•, (Josephine Vaillant)ÁöĄŚßď,ŚŹęŚć°Áąĺ¬∑ŚľóťáĆŚĺ∑Śą©ŚłĆ¬∑ÁĪ≥ś≠áÁąĺ¬∑Áď¶Ťė≠ÁČĻ(Karl Friedrich Michael Vaillant),Áą∂Ť¶™ÁīĄÁŅį¬∑ŚĖ¨ś≤Ľ¬∑Ť≥ďŚ£ę(Johann Georg Benz)śėĮšłÄšĹćÁĀęŤĽäŚŹłś©ü. Pin-s a babalaki i Pin-s lecuhan cacay a mihcaan kya malaacawaw. tusa a mihcaan ku nikauzip ni Pin-s hawsa i silamalay mapatay. itawya kya sumad han mikilul tu ngangan nu wama, ci Ka-al¬∑Bu-li-te-li-si¬∑Mi-sye-al¬∑Pn-s han "Karl Friedrich Michael Benz,zikuz panganganen aca tu "Carl Friedrich Michael Benz" (Karl Friedrich Michael Benz,ŚĺĆŚŹąśĒĻÁāļCarl Friedrich Michael Benz). ci Pin-s maydih ci niza tu wama maelecad musakakawaw i silamalay, 1853 a mihcaan malingatu i Ka-al-s-lu-al tucek pasubana' tu ce-lan-ke-syeay cungusye micudad, 1860 a mihcaan, 15 ku mihcaan ni Pin-se makaawas tu seking nu talakaway a cacudadan tiza satu micudad, micudad tu Ka-al-s-lu-al-cung-he-li-kung nu talakaway a cacudadan "zikuzayay nu Ka-al-s-lu-al nu talakaway a cacudadan" minanam tu kikayay a kawaw i 1865 a mihcaan pahezek micudada. napahezek micudad, kilul satu i pinaay a kikayan a kusi mala u misekeyay ku kawaw, na i Wiy-ye-na henay musakawaw tu mukinay a kusi. unamahiza, mala kikayay a sayhu ci Pin-se mala u saayaway tu nu kazizeng a kusi, 1914 a mihcaan, pabelien nu Ka-al-s-lu-al talakaway a cacudadan tu matinengay a puwse ci niza. 1929 a mihca 4 a bulad q4 a demiad, 84 tu ku mihcaan ni Pin-se nasiimelang tu takulaway kyu mapatay i Te-kow-la-ten-paw. 1871 a mihcaan, ci Pin-s aci Aw-ku-ste¬∑Li-te-al malcabay misakusi tu kikayay nu micunusay tu kawaw i Ma-n-hay-mu, nika uyzasa caay kasiwantan ci Li-te-al, caay kakapah ku nipikuwan tu kusi, kusiay a duku maala tu nu syebu, u saacawaen niza macukaymas tu ku nipanubuan nu lumaa', macakay tu ku zuma a zaysang ni Li-te-al. 1872 a mihcaan malaacawa tu saacawaen niza, zikuz lalima tu ku wawa. kanahatu caay kakapah ku kusi, ci Pin-s lalid satu migingkiw tu baluhay a sahaka, 1879 a mihcaan pakala tu tekeday a nigingkuwan tu al-sin-ce haka a kikay, anuayaw malalid aca pakala tu sakadadawa a kikay, dingkiay a satilamal, hu-hwa-sa, ci-hwa-ci, li-he-ci, sumad tu kalamkam atu sapilasawad tu akuti' a namun. nika uyza kusi a sapisanga' a kalisiw kalamkam a macunus ku, milungiuc ku gingku tu kusi kanca a pacakaten tu tabakiay a kusi, ci Pin-s misulup dada' tu zumaay a kalisiw, sazikuzay kusi niza mala u makakadumay tu a kusi, i lalabu payhun 5% kuben atu cayay kayadah a nadimiadan a cung-cin-li, saaca caay tu kalalid sa ciniza migingkiw tu baluhay a tuud, 1883 a mihcaan, miliyas tu ciniza tu kusi. . ciniza aci Man-hay-mu makakadum patizeng tu patiyamay a tawki tu kyesi nu batikal, mihelup miala tu adiding a kalisiw, patizeng tu nu uzipay Pin-s a kusi,ay lingatu sanay 25 dada' kk misakakawaway, namahiza pacakay tu tekeday a nisanga'an niza tu sapihaka a kikay. . Pin-s a kusi Ť≥ďŚ£ęŚÖ¨ŚŹł Pin-s kusiay nu mikawaway a tademaw m akay 1890 a mkihcaan 50 ku tademaw katukuh 1899 a mihcaan macunus tu 430 ku tademaw, itawya nisanga'ay a kazizeng 572, malau tabakiay a kusi, izaw tu ku baluhay nu mikadumay a kaput. baluhay a misakaputay milunguc ci Pin-san yadahen ku nipisanga' tu mayasuyay a kazizeng. 1893 a mihcaan pabaluhay misanga' ciniza tu "Wiy-tu-li-ya" tusaay a aenengan a kazizeng 3 mali, u sakalamkam paytatukian 18 kjng-li, tawya a mihcaan 45 a kazizeng ku mapacakayay. 1894 a mihcaan patahkal nisumad "wiy-lowa kazizeng, malaheci mapacakay ku 1200 a kazizeng, milihiza tu saayaway a nikasedsed nu kazizeng, kasasedsedan a zazan na i Pa-li katukuh i Lu-ang. 1895 a mihcaan ci Pin-s miseyki tu saayaway a tulaku i kitakit, 1896 a mihcaan miseyki tu mjutizengay a sapihakka a kikay. 1893 . nika uyni a dimiadan kusi nuheni mababekel nu S-tu-cya-teay a Ty-mu-le a kusi, Ty-mu-le a kusi patahakal tu "Mey-say-te-s" 35 maliay a kazizeng, tung-se-huy nu kusi caay pisasudang ci Pin-sean, mipapikawaw tu Ba-kow nu miseyki a sayhu, 1903 a mihca 1 a bulad 24 a demiad, tatenga'ay tu miales ciniza, tahdauc ku nipiliwan nu kusi tung-s a enengan. . 1906 a mihcaan, ci Pin-s malimad mueneng tayza i La-te-paw, atu wawa nu uzip mapulung patizeng tu "Pin-s malawamaay a kusi" mkisanga' tu mihakaay kikayaw atu kazizeng, kapah ku kazizeng nuheni, mala u Lun-tun nu saayaway a hayya. 1914 a mihca 11 a bulad 25 a demkiad 70 tu ku mihcaan ni Pin-s mapabeli nu Ka-al-s-lu-al nu talakaway a cacudadan tu matinengay a puwse. 1923 a mihcaan, u kusi misanga' tu 350 ku kazizeng, misanga' ciniza tu 25 mali atu 8 mali nu uzipay a kazizedng, katukuh ayza masinga' tu. saayaway nu kalalais nu kitakit, Pin-s a kusi atu Tay-mu-le a kusi misanga' amin tu tuud nu hutay, zikuz namalalais miliyaw misanga' tu kazizeng, nika zikuzan namalalais mangelu' ku nikauzip nu Te-kow, hinisa u sapataytay a tuud ku kazizedng sa, 15% talakaw ku nipiala tu damsu, namahiza manikaw tu simal. 1219 a mihcaan Pin-s a kusi maydih makakadum atu Tay-mu-le, nika kaian nu Tay-mu-le a kusi. . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == kar~…ĺ*bu-r~…ĺi-t…ô-r~…ĺi-si*pin-s "kamu nu t…ô, karr~…ĺ fri…ôdri ¶ńß b…ônz, **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad katukuńß **** a ńßińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad" t…ô-kow kikaj a sajńßu atu sinmuŇč nu mikawawaj, u saajawaj misaŇča Ē~ ° tu pin-s a kaziz…ôŇč ¶iniza, **** a mińß ¶aan mis…ôki atu misaŇča Ē~ ° tu ¶a ¶ajaj a kaŇčkaŇč mar~…ĺikataj a kikaj mi ¶uduńßaj tu tur~…ĺuaj bińß…ôr~…ĺ a kaziz…ôŇč, u saajawaj tańßkar~…ĺ i kitakit, ajza masiŇča Ē~ ° tu i r~…ĺabu nu s-tu- ¶ja-pin-s a po-u-kwaŇč. **** a mkińß ¶aan misaŇča Ē~ ° tu saajawaj s…ôpataj a bińß…ôr~…ĺ a *air~…ĺr~…ĺant", ¶i ka-ar~…ĺ*bu-r~…ĺi-t…ô-r~…ĺi-si*mi-sj…ô-ar~…ĺ*wa-r~…ĺan-t…ô "karr~…ĺ fri…ôdri ¶ńß mi ¶ńßa…ôr~…ĺ *air~…ĺr~…ĺant" ku ŇčaŇčan, wama ¶i j…ô-ńßan* ¶jaw- ¶…ô*pin-s "*ońßann g…ôorg b…ônz" babar~…ĺaki i pin-s r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan kja mar~…ĺaa ¶awaw. tusa a mińß ¶aan ku nikauzip ni pin-s ńßawsa i sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj mapataj. itawja kja sumad ńßan mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu ŇčaŇčan nu wama, ka-ar~…ĺ-s-r~…ĺu-ar~…ĺ- ¶uŇč-ńß…ô-r~…ĺi-kuŇč nu tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan "zikuzajaj nu ka-ar~…ĺ-s-r~…ĺu-ar~…ĺ nu tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan" minanam tu kikajaj a kawaw i **** a mińß ¶aan pańß…ôz…ôk mi ¶udada. napańß…ôz…ôk mi ¶udad, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ satu i pinaaj a kikajan a kusi mar~…ĺa u mis…ôk…ôaj ku kawaw, na i wij-j…ô-na ńß…ônaj musakawaw tu mukinaj a kusi. unamańßiza, mar~…ĺa kikajaj a sajńßu ¶i pin-s r~…ĺar~…ĺid satu migiŇčkiw tu bar~…ĺuńßaj a sańßaka, **** a mińß ¶aan pakar~…ĺa tu t…ôk…ôdaj a nigiŇčkuwan tu ar~…ĺ-sin- ¶…ô ńßaka a kikaj, anuajaw mar~…ĺar~…ĺid a ¶a pakar~…ĺa tu sakadadawa a kikaj, diŇčkiaj a satir~…ĺamar~…ĺ, ńßu-ńßwa-sa, ¶i-ńßwa- ¶i, r~…ĺi-ńß…ô- ¶i, sumad tu kar~…ĺamkam atu sapir~…ĺasawad tu akuti Ē~ ° a namun. nika ujza kusi a sapisaŇča Ē~ ° a kar~…ĺisiw kar~…ĺamkam a r~…ĺar~…ĺabu pajńßun *% kub…ôn atu ¶ajaj kajadańß a nadimiadan a ¶uŇč- ¶in-r~…ĺi, saa ¶a ¶aaj tu kar~…ĺar~…ĺid sa ¶iniza migiŇčkiw tu bar~…ĺuńßaj a tuud, **** a mińß ¶aan, mir~…ĺijas tu ¶iniza tu ** dada Ē~ ° kk misakakawawaj, namańßiza pa ¶akaj tu t…ôk…ôdaj a nisaŇča Ē~ °an niza tu sapińßaka a kikaj. . pin-s a kusi **** pin-s kusiaj nu mikawawaj a tad…ômaw m akaj **** a mkińß ¶aan ** ku tad…ômaw katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan ma ¶unus tu *** ku tad…ômaw, itawja nisaŇča Ē~ °aj a kaziz…ôŇč ***, mar~…ĺau tabakiaj a kusi, izaw tu ku bar~…ĺuńßaj nu mikadumaj a kaput. bar~…ĺuńßaj a misakaputaj mir~…ĺuŇču ¶ ¶i pin-san jadańß…ôn ku nipisaŇča Ē~ ° tu majasujaj a kaziz…ôŇč. **** a mińß ¶aan pabar~…ĺuńßaj misaŇča Ē~ ° ¶iniza tu "wij-tu-r~…ĺi-ja" tusaaj a a…ôn…ôŇčan a kaziz…ôŇč * mar~…ĺi, u sakar~…ĺamkam pajtatukian ** kjŇč-r~…ĺi, tawja a mińß ¶aan ** a kaziz…ôŇč ku mapa ¶akajaj. **** a mińß ¶aan patańßkar~…ĺ nisumad "wij-r~…ĺowa kaziz…ôŇč, mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i mapa ¶akaj ku **** a kaziz…ôŇč, mir~…ĺińßiza tu saajawaj a nikas…ôds…ôd nu kaziz…ôŇč, kasas…ôds…ôdan a zazan na i pa-r~…ĺi katukuńß i r~…ĺu-aŇč. **** a mińß ¶aan ¶i pin-s mis…ôki tu saajawaj a tur~…ĺaku i kitakit, **** a mińß ¶aan mis…ôki tu mjutiz…ôŇčaj a sapińßakka a kikaj. **** . nika ujni a dimiadan kusi nuńß…ôni mabab…ôk…ôr~…ĺ nu s-tu- ¶ja-t…ôaj a tj-mu-r~…ĺ…ô a kusi, tj-mu-r~…ĺ…ô a kusi patańßakar~…ĺ tu "m…ô-saj-t…ô-s" ** mar~…ĺiaj a kaziz…ôŇč, tuŇč-s…ô-ńßuj nu kusi ¶aaj pisasudaŇč ¶i pin-s…ôan, mipapikawaw tu ba-kow nu mis…ôki a sajńßu, **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj tu miar~…ĺ…ôs ¶iniza, tańßdau ¶ ku nipir~…ĺiwan nu kusi tuŇč-s a …ôn…ôŇčan. . **** a mińß ¶aan, ¶i pin-s mar~…ĺimad mu…ôn…ôŇč tajza i r~…ĺa-t…ô-paw, atu wawa nu uzip mapur~…ĺuŇč patiz…ôŇč tu "pin-s mar~…ĺawamaaj a kusi" mkisaŇča Ē~ ° tu mińßakaaj kikajaw atu kaziz…ôŇč, kapańß ku kaziz…ôŇč nuńß…ôni, mar~…ĺa u r~…ĺun-tun nu saajawaj a ńßajja. **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômkiad ** tu ku mińß ¶aan ni pin-s mapab…ôr~…ĺi nu ka-ar~…ĺ-s-r~…ĺu-ar~…ĺ nu tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan tu matin…ôŇčaj a puws…ô. **** a mińß ¶aan, u kusi misaŇča Ē~ ° tu *** ku kaziz…ôŇč, misaŇča Ē~ ° ¶iniza tu ** mar~…ĺi atu * mar~…ĺi nu uzipaj a kaziz…ôdŇč, katukuńß ajza masiŇča Ē~ ° tu. saajawaj nu kar~…ĺar~…ĺais nu kitakit, pin-s a kusi atu taj-mu-r~…ĺ…ô a kusi misaŇča Ē~ ° amin tu tuud nu ńßutaj, zikuz namar~…ĺar~…ĺais mir~…ĺijaw misaŇča Ē~ ° tu kaziz…ôŇč, nika zikuzan namar~…ĺar~…ĺais maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° ku nikauzip nu t…ô-kow, ńßinisa u sapatajtaj a tuud ku kaziz…ôdŇč sa, **% tar~…ĺakaw ku nipiar~…ĺa tu damsu, namańßiza manikaw tu simar~…ĺ. **** a mińß ¶aan pin-s a kusi majdińß makakadum atu taj-mu-r~…ĺ…ô, nika kaian nu taj-mu-r~…ĺ…ô a kusi. . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == kal¬∑bu-li-te-li-si¬∑Pin-s "kamu nu Te, Karl Friedrich Benz, 1844 a mihca 11 a bulad 25 a demiad katukuh 1929 a hihca 4 a bulad 4 a demiad" Te-kow kikay a sayhu atu sinmung nu mikawaway, u saayaway misanga' tu Pin-s a kazizeng ciniza, 1885 a mihcaan miseyki atu misanga' tu cacayay a kangkang malikatay a kikay micuduhay tu tuluay bihel a kazizeng, u saayaway tahkal i kitakit, ayza masinga' tu i labu nu s-tu-cya-Pin-s a po-u-kwang. 1886 a mkihcaan misanga' tu saayaway sepatay a bihel a kazizeng, malingatu pacakay i Ow-co, 1899 a mihcaan misanga' tu saayaway a sapidademec a kazizeng, 1906 a mihcaan Pin-s atu tatusaay a wawa niza i la-ten-paw patizeng tu pin-s malawama a kusi, Pin-s a kazizeng mala singanganay a paya nu kitakid, 1926 a mihcaan papulung han ku Pin-s a kusi atu tay-mu kazizeng. 1844 a mihca 11 a bulad 25 a demiad, ci Pin-s lecuhan i Te-kow-pa-ten-Bu-ten-paw ayaw nu kalaacawaan nu ama ina a lecuhen niza, namahiza mikulul tu ngangan ni ina ci Ye-se-ben¬∑Wa-lan-te "Josephine Vaillant", ci Ka-al¬∑Bu-li-te-li-si¬∑Mi-sye-al¬∑Wa-lan-te "Karl Friedrich Michael Vaillant" ku ngangan, wama ci Ye-han¬∑Cyaw-ce¬∑pin-s "Johann Georg Benz" u paculilay tu kazizeng" 1844ŚĻī11śúą25śó•, (Josephine Vaillant)ÁöĄŚßď,ŚŹęŚć°Áąĺ¬∑ŚľóťáĆŚĺ∑Śą©ŚłĆ¬∑ÁĪ≥ś≠áÁąĺ¬∑Áď¶Ťė≠ÁČĻ(Karl Friedrich Michael Vaillant),Áą∂Ť¶™ÁīĄÁŅį¬∑ŚĖ¨ś≤Ľ¬∑Ť≥ďŚ£ę(Johann Georg Benz)śėĮšłÄšĹćÁĀęŤĽäŚŹłś©ü. Pin-s a babalaki i Pin-s lecuhan cacay a mihcaan kya malaacawaw. tusa a mihcaan ku nikauzip ni Pin-s hawsa i silamalay mapatay. itawya kya sumad han mikilul tu ngangan nu wama, ci Ka-al¬∑Bu-li-te-li-si¬∑Mi-sye-al¬∑Pn-s han "Karl Friedrich Michael Benz,zikuz panganganen aca tu "Carl Friedrich Michael Benz" (Karl Friedrich Michael Benz,ŚĺĆŚŹąśĒĻÁāļCarl Friedrich Michael Benz). ci Pin-s maydih ci niza tu wama maelecad musakakawaw i silamalay, 1853 a mihcaan malingatu i Ka-al-s-lu-al tucek pasubana' tu ce-lan-ke-syeay cungusye micudad, 1860 a mihcaan, 15 ku mihcaan ni Pin-se makaawas tu seking nu talakaway a cacudadan tiza satu micudad, micudad tu Ka-al-s-lu-al-cung-he-li-kung nu talakaway a cacudadan "zikuzayay nu Ka-al-s-lu-al nu talakaway a cacudadan" minanam tu kikayay a kawaw i 1865 a mihcaan pahezek micudada. napahezek micudad, kilul satu i pinaay a kikayan a kusi mala u misekeyay ku kawaw, na i Wiy-ye-na henay musakawaw tu mukinay a kusi. unamahiza, mala kikayay a sayhu ci Pin-se mala u saayaway tu nu kazizeng a kusi, 1914 a mihcaan, pabelien nu Ka-al-s-lu-al talakaway a cacudadan tu matinengay a puwse ci niza. 1929 a mihca 4 a bulad q4 a demiad, 84 tu ku mihcaan ni Pin-se nasiimelang tu takulaway kyu mapatay i Te-kow-la-ten-paw. 1871 a mihcaan, ci Pin-s aci Aw-ku-ste¬∑Li-te-al malcabay misakusi tu kikayay nu micunusay tu kawaw i Ma-n-hay-mu, nika uyzasa caay kasiwantan ci Li-te-al, caay kakapah ku nipikuwan tu kusi, kusiay a duku maala tu nu syebu, u saacawaen niza macukaymas tu ku nipanubuan nu lumaa', macakay tu ku zuma a zaysang ni Li-te-al. 1872 a mihcaan malaacawa tu saacawaen niza, zikuz lalima tu ku wawa. kanahatu caay kakapah ku kusi, ci Pin-s lalid satu migingkiw tu baluhay a sahaka, 1879 a mihcaan pakala tu tekeday a nigingkuwan tu al-sin-ce haka a kikay, anuayaw malalid aca pakala tu sakadadawa a kikay, dingkiay a satilamal, hu-hwa-sa, ci-hwa-ci, li-he-ci, sumad tu kalamkam atu sapilasawad tu akuti' a namun. nika uyza kusi a sapisanga' a kalisiw kalamkam a macunus ku, milungiuc ku gingku tu kusi kanca a pacakaten tu tabakiay a kusi, ci Pin-s misulup dada' tu zumaay a kalisiw, sazikuzay kusi niza mala u makakadumay tu a kusi, i lalabu payhun 5% kuben atu cayay kayadah a nadimiadan a cung-cin-li, saaca caay tu kalalid sa ciniza migingkiw tu baluhay a tuud, 1883 a mihcaan, miliyas tu ciniza tu kusi. . ciniza aci Man-hay-mu makakadum patizeng tu patiyamay a tawki tu kyesi nu batikal, mihelup miala tu adiding a kalisiw, patizeng tu nu uzipay Pin-s a kusi,ay lingatu sanay 25 dada' kk misakakawaway, namahiza pacakay tu tekeday a nisanga'an niza tu sapihaka a kikay. . Pin-s a kusi Ť≥ďŚ£ęŚÖ¨ŚŹł Pin-s kusiay nu mikawaway a tademaw m akay 1890 a mkihcaan 50 ku tademaw katukuh 1899 a mihcaan macunus tu 430 ku tademaw, itawya nisanga'ay a kazizeng 572, malau tabakiay a kusi, izaw tu ku baluhay nu mikadumay a kaput. baluhay a misakaputay milunguc ci Pin-san yadahen ku nipisanga' tu mayasuyay a kazizeng. 1893 a mihcaan pabaluhay misanga' ciniza tu "Wiy-tu-li-ya" tusaay a aenengan a kazizeng 3 mali, u sakalamkam paytatukian 18 kjng-li, tawya a mihcaan 45 a kazizeng ku mapacakayay. 1894 a mihcaan patahkal nisumad "wiy-lowa kazizeng, malaheci mapacakay ku 1200 a kazizeng, milihiza tu saayaway a nikasedsed nu kazizeng, kasasedsedan a zazan na i Pa-li katukuh i Lu-ang. 1895 a mihcaan ci Pin-s miseyki tu saayaway a tulaku i kitakit, 1896 a mihcaan miseyki tu mjutizengay a sapihakka a kikay. 1893 . nika uyni a dimiadan kusi nuheni mababekel nu S-tu-cya-teay a Ty-mu-le a kusi, Ty-mu-le a kusi patahakal tu "Mey-say-te-s" 35 maliay a kazizeng, tung-se-huy nu kusi caay pisasudang ci Pin-sean, mipapikawaw tu Ba-kow nu miseyki a sayhu, 1903 a mihca 1 a bulad 24 a demiad, tatenga'ay tu miales ciniza, tahdauc ku nipiliwan nu kusi tung-s a enengan. . 1906 a mihcaan, ci Pin-s malimad mueneng tayza i La-te-paw, atu wawa nu uzip mapulung patizeng tu "Pin-s malawamaay a kusi" mkisanga' tu mihakaay kikayaw atu kazizeng, kapah ku kazizeng nuheni, mala u Lun-tun nu saayaway a hayya. 1914 a mihca 11 a bulad 25 a demkiad 70 tu ku mihcaan ni Pin-s mapabeli nu Ka-al-s-lu-al nu talakaway a cacudadan tu matinengay a puwse. 1923 a mihcaan, u kusi misanga' tu 350 ku kazizeng, misanga' ciniza tu 25 mali atu 8 mali nu uzipay a kazizedng, katukuh ayza masinga' tu. saayaway nu kalalais nu kitakit, Pin-s a kusi atu Tay-mu-le a kusi misanga' amin tu tuud nu hutay, zikuz namalalais miliyaw misanga' tu kazizeng, nika zikuzan namalalais mangelu' ku nikauzip nu Te-kow, hinisa u sapataytay a tuud ku kazizedng sa, 15% talakaw ku nipiala tu damsu, namahiza manikaw tu simal. 1219 a mihcaan Pin-s a kusi maydih makakadum atu Tay-mu-le, nika kaian nu Tay-mu-le a kusi. . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == kar~…ĺ*bu-r~…ĺi-t…ô-r~…ĺi-si*pin-s "kamu nu t…ô, karr~…ĺ fri…ôdri ¶ńß b…ônz, **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad katukuńß **** a ńßińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad" t…ô-kow kikaj a sajńßu atu sinmuŇč nu mikawawaj, u saajawaj misaŇča Ē~ ° tu pin-s a kaziz…ôŇč ¶iniza, **** a mińß ¶aan mis…ôki atu misaŇča Ē~ ° tu ¶a ¶ajaj a kaŇčkaŇč mar~…ĺikataj a kikaj mi ¶uduńßaj tu tur~…ĺuaj bińß…ôr~…ĺ a kaziz…ôŇč, u saajawaj tańßkar~…ĺ i kitakit, ajza masiŇča Ē~ ° tu i r~…ĺabu nu s-tu- ¶ja-pin-s a po-u-kwaŇč. **** a mkińß ¶aan misaŇča Ē~ ° tu saajawaj s…ôpataj a bińß…ôr~…ĺ a *air~…ĺr~…ĺant", ¶i ka-ar~…ĺ*bu-r~…ĺi-t…ô-r~…ĺi-si*mi-sj…ô-ar~…ĺ*wa-r~…ĺan-t…ô "karr~…ĺ fri…ôdri ¶ńß mi ¶ńßa…ôr~…ĺ *air~…ĺr~…ĺant" ku ŇčaŇčan, wama ¶i j…ô-ńßan* ¶jaw- ¶…ô*pin-s "*ońßann g…ôorg b…ônz" tad…ômaw katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan ma ¶unus tu *** ku tad…ômaw, itawja nisaŇča Ē~ °aj a kaziz…ôŇč ***, mar~…ĺau tabakiaj a kusi, izaw tu ku bar~…ĺuńßaj nu mikadumaj a kaput. bar~…ĺuńßaj a misakaputaj mir~…ĺuŇču ¶ ¶i pin-san jadańß…ôn ku nipisaŇča Ē~ ° tu majasujaj a kaziz…ôŇč. **** a mińß ¶aan pabar~…ĺuńßaj misaŇča Ē~ ° ¶iniza tu "wij-tu-r~…ĺi-ja" tusaaj a a…ôn…ôŇčan a kaziz…ôŇč * mar~…ĺi, u sakar~…ĺamkam pajtatukian ** kjŇč-r~…ĺi, tawja a mińß ¶aan ** a kaziz…ôŇč ku mapa ¶akajaj. **** a mińß ¶aan patańßkar~…ĺ nisumad "wij-r~…ĺowa kaziz…ôŇč, mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i mapa ¶akaj ku **** a kaziz…ôŇč, mir~…ĺińßiza tu saajawaj a nikas…ôds…ôd nu kaziz…ôŇč, kasas…ôds…ôdan a zazan na i pa-r~…ĺi katukuńß i r~…ĺu-aŇč. **** a mińß ¶aan ¶i pin-s mis…ôki tu saajawaj a tur~…ĺaku i kitakit, **** a mińß ¶aan mis…ôki tu mjutiz…ôŇčaj a sapińßakka a kikaj. **** . nika ujni a dimiadan kusi nuńß…ôni mabab…ôk…ôr~…ĺ nu s-tu- ¶ja-t…ôaj a tj-mu-r~…ĺ…ô a kusi, tj-mu-r~…ĺ…ô a kusi patańßakar~…ĺ tu "m…ô-saj-t…ô-s" ** tańßdau ¶ ku nipir~…ĺiwan nu kusi tuŇč-s a …ôn…ôŇčan. . **** a mińß ¶aan, ¶i pin-s mar~…ĺimad mu…ôn…ôŇč tajza i r~…ĺa-t…ô-paw, atu wawa nu uzip mapur~…ĺuŇč patiz…ôŇč tu "pin-s mar~…ĺawamaaj a kusi" mapab…ôr~…ĺi nu ka-ar~…ĺ-s-r~…ĺu-ar~…ĺ nu tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan tu matin…ôŇčaj a puws…ô. **** a mińß ¶aan, u kusi misaŇča Ē~ ° tu *** ku kaziz…ôŇč, misaŇča Ē~ ° ¶iniza tu ** mar~…ĺi atu * mar~…ĺi nu uzipaj a kaziz…ôdŇč, katukuńß ajza masiŇča Ē~ ° tu. saajawaj nu kar~…ĺar~…ĺais nu kitakit, pin-s a kusi atu taj-mu-r~…ĺ…ô a kusi misaŇča Ē~ ° amin tu tuud nu ńßutaj, zikuz namar~…ĺar~…ĺais mir~…ĺijaw misaŇča Ē~ ° tu kaziz…ôŇč, nika zikuzan namar~…ĺar~…ĺais maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° ku nikauzip nu t…ô-kow, ńßinisa u sapatajtaj a tuud ku kaziz…ôdŇč sa, **% tar~…ĺakaw ku nipiar~…ĺa tu damsu, namańßiza manikaw tu simar~…ĺ. **** a mińß ¶aan pin-s a kusi majdińß makakadum atu taj-mu-r~…ĺ…ô, nika kaian nu taj-mu-r~…ĺ…ô a kusi. . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
